description: A shipment arrives from a supplier, but the items received do not match the purchase order.

nodes.task_description: The receiving worker notes the discrepancy during the receiving process.

expected_outcome.value: The system flags a mismatch between the PO and the goods received.
The incorrect items are set aside.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to report the discrepancy and determine a resolution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the supplier, who agrees to ship the correct items and take back the incorrect ones.
